issues.description: SDK client.py is missing from source tree. Critical blocker for agent integration.
Redis key mismatch in token revocation. issue() uses 'acp:subject:' prefix, but revoke_all_for_agent() uses REDIS_AGENT_PREFIX ('acp:agent:'). Revocation is broken.
Uninitialized httpx clients (_registry_client and _audit_client). Service will crash on first evaluation request.
main.py fails to call set_registry_redis(). Cache invalidation is effectively disabled.
NetworkPolicy blocks critical services (decision, behavior, registry) from reaching Redis. System will fail in K8s.
Check-then-set race condition in cryptographic chain updates when multiple Audit workers process events for the same tenant. Risking chain corruption.
API path mismatch for billing summary. Usage service provides /usage/summary but Gateway calls /usage/usage/summary.
Gateway missing /audit prefix when calling Audit service endpoints (risk timeline, top threats). Mismatch with Audit service routing.
refresh_token issues new token based on old claims without re-validating role/tenant state in DB. Role changes won't propagate until next full login.
Direct httpx.AsyncClient instantiation per request in proxies. Inefficient and risks connection exhaustion.
Audit chain verification is O(N) over all logs per tenant. Will not scale to production volumes.

api_mismatches.issue: proxy_auth_token flattens 'data' field but subsequent proxies in main.py just return raw resp.json(). Inconsistent API response structure.
